valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 9 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 10 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low moving rapidly northeast, expected 150 miles west of Rockall 964 by midday tomorrow. New low expected Fisher 1011 by same time

In west, cyclonic 4 to 6. In east, southeasterly 7 to severe gale 9, decreasing 6 later.

In west, rain. In east, sleet.

In west, good, occasionally poor. In east, poor.
